title: Exception v1alpha1
description: Excepts one asset from the normal REQUIRED/DENIED enforcement rules for a stated, expiring window (init.md "Activation Intent"; docs/product/requirements.md §4; internal/resolve.Resolve is the sole consumer of the resolver-input fields below). Unlike Profile/Binding/Activation, the exception fields are top-level siblings of apiVersion/kind/metadata rather than nested under a `spec` object -- see internal/domain/exception.go's doc comment for why.

assetId.description: The asset id (skill/mcpServer/instruction) this exception applies to.

scope.description: The defining Profile's metadata.id whose REQUIRED or DENIED intent this exception excepts. An exception whose scope does not match the defining Profile's id does not apply.

justification.description: Human-authored reason this exception is allowed.

expiresAt.description: The instant this exception stops applying. An exception whose expiresAt is at or before the resolver's reference time is expired and inert.
